title: helichrysum pandurifolium
intro: Helichrysum pandurifolium is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, commonly known as the 'Golden Everlasting'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for wound healing and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum pandurifolium include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, while also being used as a natural remedy for anxiety and stress. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or applied topically to the affected area.
